tZh: 可视化与理解循环网络
sEn: LSTM networks learn interpretable cells that track long-range dependencies like line lengths and brackets, outperforming n-gram models on structural patterns.
sZh: LSTM网络能够学习可解释的细胞，追踪如行长度和括号等长距离依赖，在结构模式上优于n-gram模型。
absEn: Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs), and specifically a variant with Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM), are enjoying renewed interest as a result of successful applications in a wide range of machine learning problems that involve sequential data. However, while LSTMs provide exceptional results in practice, the source of their performance and their limitations remain rather poorly understood. Using character-level language models as an interpretable testbed, we aim to bridge this gap by providing an analysis of their representations, predictions and error types. In particular, our experiments reveal the existence of interpretable cells that keep track of long-range dependencies such as line lengths, quotes and brackets. Moreover, our comparative analysis with finite horizon n-gram models traces the source of the LSTM improvements to long-range structural dependencies. Finally, we provide analysis of the remaining errors and suggests areas for further study.
absZh: 循环神经网络（RNN），特别是带有长短期记忆（LSTM）的变体，由于在涉及序列数据的广泛机器学习问题中的成功应用，正重新引起人们的兴趣。然而，尽管LSTM在实践中提供了出色的结果，但其性能的来源和局限性仍然相当不明确。使用字符级语言模型作为可解释的测试平台，我们旨在通过分析其表示、预测和错误类型来弥合这一差距。特别是，我们的实验揭示了可解释细胞的存在，这些细胞跟踪长距离依赖，如行长度、引号和括号。此外，我们与有限视野n-gram模型的比较分析将LSTM改进的来源追溯到长距离结构依赖。最后，我们分析了剩余的错误，并提出了进一步研究的领域。

contrib.en: Reveals interpretable LSTM cells tracking long-range dependencies like line lengths, quotes, and brackets in real-world data.
contrib.zh: 揭示了可解释的LSTM细胞，在真实数据中跟踪长距离依赖，如行长度、引号和括号。

contrib.en: Demonstrates LSTM outperforms n-gram models on characters requiring long-range reasoning, e.g., closing braces.
contrib.zh: 证明LSTM在需要长距离推理的字符上优于n-gram模型，例如闭合花括号。

contrib.en: Provides error breakdown using oracles, showing 37% errors follow spaces/quotes/newlines, indicating word-level prediction difficulty.
contrib.zh: 使用预言机进行错误分解，显示37%的错误出现在空格/引号/换行后，表明词级预测困难。

contrib.en: Shows scaling up model size mainly reduces local n-gram errors, leaving other error categories largely unchanged.
contrib.zh: 表明扩大模型规模主要减少局部n-gram错误，其他错误类别基本不变。

contrib.en: Analyzes gate activation statistics, revealing nearly binary saturation in deeper layers but diffuse activations in the first layer.
contrib.zh: 分析门激活统计，揭示深层近乎二值饱和，但第一层激活分散。

contrib.en: Trains LSTM training dynamics, showing it progressively models longer dependencies over time.
contrib.zh: 追踪LSTM训练动态，显示其随时间逐步建模更长依赖。

limits.en: Analysis limited to character-level language models on two datasets (War and Peace, Linux Kernel).
limits.zh: 分析仅限于两个数据集（战争与和平、Linux内核）上的字符级语言模型。

limits.en: Error breakdown uses oracles in a fixed order, which may influence results.
limits.zh: 错误分解使用固定顺序的预言机，可能影响结果。

limits.en: Study does not explore architectural innovations beyond LSTM, GRU, and RNN.
limits.zh: 研究未探索LSTM、GRU和RNN之外的架构创新。

limits.en: Findings on scaling may not generalize to other tasks or larger models.
limits.zh: 关于规模扩张的发现可能不适用于其他任务或更大模型。

limits.en: Interpretability of cells is qualitative and may not capture all learned representations.
limits.zh: 细胞的可解释性是定性的，可能无法捕捉所有学习到的表示。

items.en: Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs), and specifically a variant with Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM), are enjoying renewed interest as a result of successful applications in a wide range of machine learning problems that involve sequential data. However, while LSTMs provide exceptional results in practice, the source of their performance and their limitations remain rather poorly understood. Using character-level language models as an interpretable testbed, we aim to bridge this gap by providing an analysis of their representations, predictions and error types. In particular, our experiments reveal the existence of interpretable cells that keep track of long-range dependencies such as line lengths, quotes and brackets. Moreover, our comparative analysis with finite horizon n𝑛n-gram models traces the source of the LSTM improvements to long-range structural dependencies. Finally, we provide analysis of the remaining errors and suggests areas for further study.
items.zh: 递归神经网络（RNN），特别是具有长短期记忆（LSTM）的变体，由于在涉及序列数据的广泛机器学习问题中的成功应用，重新引起了人们的兴趣。然而，尽管LSTM在实践中提供了出色的结果，但其性能的来源和局限性仍然相当不为人知。通过使用字符级语言模型作为可解释的测试平台，我们旨在通过分析其表示、预测和错误类型来弥合这一差距。特别是，我们的实验揭示了存在可解释的细胞，这些细胞跟踪长距离依赖关系，如行长度、引号和括号。此外，我们与有限视野n-gram模型的比较分析将LSTM改进的来源追溯到长距离结构依赖关系。最后，我们提供了剩余错误的分析，并提出了进一步研究的领域。

items.en: Recurrent Neural Networks, and specifically a variant with Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) Hochreiter & Schmidhuber (1997), have recently emerged as an effective model in a wide variety of applications that involve sequential data. These include language modeling Mikolov et al. (2010), handwriting recognition and generation Graves (2013), machine translation Sutskever et al. (2014); Bahdanau et al. (2014), speech recognition Graves et al. (2013), video analysis Donahue et al. (2015) and image captioning Vinyals et al. (2015); Karpathy & Fei-Fei (2015).
items.zh: 递归神经网络，特别是具有长短期记忆（LSTM）的变体（Hochreiter & Schmidhuber, 1997），最近在涉及序列数据的各种应用中成为有效模型。这些包括语言建模（Mikolov et al., 2010）、手写识别和生成（Graves, 2013）、机器翻译（Sutskever et al., 2014; Bahdanau et al., 2014）、语音识别（Graves et al., 2013）、视频分析（Donahue et al., 2015）和图像描述（Vinyals et al., 2015; Karpathy & Fei-Fei, 2015）。

items.en: However, both the source of their impressive performance and their shortcomings remain poorly understood. This raises concerns of the lack of interpretability and limits our ability design better architectures. A few recent ablation studies analyzed the effects on performance as various gates and connections are removed Greff et al. (2015); Chung et al. (2014). However, while this analysis illuminates the performance-critical pieces of the architecture, it is still limited to examining the effects only on the global level of the final test set perplexity alone. Similarly, an often cited advantage of the LSTM architecture is that it can store and retrieve information over long time scales using its gating mechanisms, and this ability has been carefully studied in toy settings Hochreiter & Schmidhuber (1997). However, it is not immediately clear that similar mechanisms can be effectively discovered and utilized by these networks in real-world data, and with the common use of simple stochastic gradient descent and truncated backpropagation through time.
items.zh: 然而，其令人印象深刻的性能的来源和缺点仍然不为人知。这引发了对缺乏可解释性的担忧，并限制了我们设计更好架构的能力。最近的一些消融研究分析了当各种门和连接被移除时对性能的影响（Greff et al., 2015; Chung et al., 2014）。然而，虽然这种分析阐明了架构中性能关键的部分，但它仍然仅限于仅检查最终测试集困惑度全局水平上的影响。类似地，LSTM架构的一个常被引用的优点是它可以使用其门控机制在长时间尺度上存储和检索信息，并且这种能力已在玩具设置中仔细研究过（Hochreiter & Schmidhuber, 1997）。然而，并不清楚这些网络是否能在真实世界数据中有效发现和利用类似的机制，并且通常使用简单的随机梯度下降和截断的时间反向传播。

items.en: To our knowledge, our work provides the first empirical exploration of the predictions of LSTMs and their learned representations on real-world data. Concretely, we use character-level language models as an interpretable testbed for illuminating the long-range dependencies learned by LSTMs. Our analysis reveals the existence of cells that robustly identify interpretable, high-level patterns such as line lengths, brackets and quotes. We further quantify the LSTM predictions with comprehensive comparison to n𝑛n-gram models, where we find that LSTMs perform significantly better on characters that require long-range reasoning. Finally, we conduct an error analysis in which we “peel the onion” of errors with a sequence of oracles. These results allow us to quantify the extent of remaining errors in several categories and to suggest specific areas for further study.
items.zh: 据我们所知，我们的工作首次对LSTM在真实世界数据上的预测及其学习到的表示进行了实证探索。具体来说，我们使用字符级语言模型作为可解释的测试平台，以阐明LSTM学习到的长距离依赖关系。我们的分析揭示了存在稳健地识别可解释高级模式（如行长度、括号和引号）的细胞。我们进一步通过与n-gram模型的全面比较来量化LSTM的预测，发现LSTM在需要长距离推理的字符上表现显著更好。最后，我们进行了一项错误分析，其中我们使用一系列预言机“剥开错误的洋葱”。这些结果使我们能够量化几个类别中剩余错误的程度，并提出具体的研究领域。

items.en: Recurrent Networks. Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs) have a long history of applications in various sequence learning tasks Werbos (1988); Schmidhuber (2015); Rumelhart et al. (1985). Despite their early successes, the difficulty of training simple recurrent networks Bengio et al. (1994); Pascanu et al. (2012) has encouraged various proposals for improvements to their basic architecture. Among the most successful variants are the Long Short Term Memory networks Hochreiter & Schmidhuber (1997), which can in principle store and retrieve information over long time periods with explicit gating mechanisms and a built-in constant error carousel. In the recent years there has been a renewed interest in further improving on the basic architecture by modifying the functional form as seen with Gated Recurrent Units Cho et al. (2014), incorporating content-based soft attention mechanisms Bahdanau et al. (2014); Weston et al. (2014), push-pop stacks Joulin & Mikolov (2015), or more generally external memory arrays with both content-based and relative addressing mechanisms Graves et al. (2014). In this work we focus the majority of our analysis on the LSTM due to its widespread popularity and a proven track record.
items.zh: 递归网络。递归神经网络（RNN）在各种序列学习任务中有着悠久的历史（Werbos, 1988; Schmidhuber, 2015; Rumelhart et al., 1985）。尽管早期取得了成功，但训练简单递归网络的困难（Bengio et al., 1994; Pascanu et al., 2012）促使人们提出了各种对其基本架构的改进。其中最成功的变体是长短期记忆网络（Hochreiter & Schmidhuber, 1997），它原则上可以通过显式的门控机制和内置的恒定误差传送带在长时间段内存储和检索信息。近年来，通过修改函数形式（如门控循环单元（Cho et al., 2014））、引入基于内容的软注意力机制（Bahdanau et al., 2014; Weston et al., 2014）、推入弹出栈（Joulin & Mikolov, 2015）或更一般地使用具有基于内容和相对寻址机制的外部存储器阵列（Graves et al., 2014），人们重新对进一步改进基本架构产生了兴趣。在这项工作中，由于LSTM的广泛流行和经过验证的记录，我们将大部分分析集中在LSTM上。

items.en: Understanding Recurrent Networks. While there is an abundance of work that modifies or extends the basic LSTM architecture, relatively little attention has been paid to understanding the properties of its representations and predictions. Greff et al. (2015) recently conducted a comprehensive study of LSTM components. Chung et al. evaluated GRU compared to LSTMs Chung et al. (2014). Jozefowicz et al. (2015) conduct an automated architecture search of thousands of RNN architectures. Pascanu et al. (2013) examined the effects of depth . These approaches study recurrent network based only on the variations in the final test set cross entropy, while we break down the performance into interpretable categories and study individual error types. Most related to our work is Hermans & Schrauwen (2013), who also study the long-term interactions learned by recurrent networks in the context of character-level language models, specifically in the context of parenthesis closing and time-scales analysis. Our work complements their results and provides additional types of analysis. Lastly, we are heavily influenced by work on in-depth analysis of errors in object detection Hoiem et al. (2012), where the final mean average precision is similarly broken down and studied in detail.
items.zh: 理解递归网络。虽然有大量工作修改或扩展了基本的LSTM架构，但相对较少关注理解其表示和预测的性质。Greff等人（2015）最近对LSTM组件进行了全面研究。Chung等人评估了GRU与LSTM的比较（Chung et al., 2014）。Jozefowicz等人（2015）对数千种RNN架构进行了自动架构搜索。Pascanu等人（2013）研究了深度的影响。这些方法仅基于最终测试集交叉熵的变化来研究递归网络，而我们则将性能分解为可解释的类别并研究单个错误类型。与我们的工作最相关的是Hermans & Schrauwen（2013），他们也研究了递归网络在字符级语言模型背景下学习到的长期交互，特别是在括号闭合和时间尺度分析方面。我们的工作补充了他们的结果，并提供了其他类型的分析。最后，我们深受目标检测错误深入分析工作（Hoiem et al., 2012）的影响，其中最终的平均精度均值被类似地分解并详细研究。

items.en: We first describe three commonly used recurrent network architectures (RNN, LSTM and the GRU), then describe their used in sequence learning and finally discuss the optimization.
items.zh: 我们首先描述三种常用的递归网络架构（RNN、LSTM和GRU），然后描述它们在序列学习中的使用，最后讨论优化。

The bottom row of vectors ht0=xtsuperscriptsubscriptℎ𝑡0subscript𝑥𝑡h_{t}^{0}=x_{t} at depth zero holds the input vectors xtsubscript𝑥𝑡x_{t} and each vector in the top row {htL}superscriptsubscriptℎ𝑡𝐿\{h_{t}^{L}\} is used to predict an output vector ytsubscript𝑦𝑡y_{t}. All intermediate vectors htlsuperscriptsubscriptℎ𝑡𝑙h_{t}^{l} are computed with a recurrence formula based on ht−1lsuperscriptsubscriptℎ𝑡1𝑙h_{t-1}^{l} and htl−1superscriptsubscriptℎ𝑡𝑙1h_{t}^{l-1}. Through these hidden vectors, each output ytsubscript𝑦𝑡y_{t} at time step t𝑡t becomes a function of all input vectors up to t𝑡t, {x1,…,xt}subscript𝑥1…subscript𝑥𝑡\{x_{1},\ldots,x_{t}\}. The precise mathematical form of the recurrence (ht−1l(h_{t-1}^{l} , htl−1)→htlh_{t}^{l-1})\rightarrow h_{t}^{l} varies from model to model and we describe these details next.
items.zh: 深度递归网络的最简单实例将隐藏状态向量h_t^l排列在二维网格中，其中t=1...T被视为时间，l=1...L是深度。深度为零的底部行向量h_t^0 = x_t保存输入向量x_t，顶部行{h_t^L}中的每个向量用于预测输出向量y_t。所有中间向量h_t^l基于h_{t-1}^l和h_t^{l-1}使用递归公式计算。通过这些隐藏向量，时间步t处的每个输出y_t成为所有输入向量直到t的函数，即{x_1,...,x_t}。递归(h_{t-1}^l, h_t^{l-1}) → h_t^l的精确数学形式因模型而异，我们接下来描述这些细节。

The parameter matrix Wlsuperscript𝑊𝑙W^{l} on each layer has dimensions [n×2​n𝑛2𝑛n\times 2n] and tanh\tanh is applied elementwise. Note that Wlsuperscript𝑊𝑙W^{l} varies between layers but is shared through time. We omit the bias vectors for brevity. This is known to be a weak form of coupling Sutskever et al. (2011). Both the LSTM and the GRU (discussed next) include more powerful multiplicative interactions.
items.zh: 其中我们假设所有h ∈ ℝ^n。每层上的参数矩阵W^l的维度为[n × 2n]，tanh逐元素应用。注意W^l在层之间变化，但在时间上共享。为简洁起见，我们省略了偏置向量。解释上述方程，来自深度下层（h_t^{l-1}）和时间上前一时刻（h_{t-1}^l）的输入通过加性交互进行变换和交互，然后被tanh压缩。这被称为一种弱耦合形式（Sutskever et al., 2011）。LSTM和GRU（接下来讨论）都包含更强大的乘法交互。

items.en: Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) Hochreiter & Schmidhuber (1997) was designed to address the difficulties of training RNNs Bengio et al. (1994). In particular, it was observed that the backpropagation dynamics caused the gradients in an RNN to either vanish or explode. It was later found that the exploding gradient concern can be alleviated with a heuristic of clipping the gradients at some maximum value Pascanu et al. (2012). On the other hand, LSTMs were designed to mitigate the vanishing gradient problem. In addition to a hidden state vector htlsuperscriptsubscriptℎ𝑡𝑙h_{t}^{l}, LSTMs also maintain a memory vector ctlsuperscriptsubscript𝑐𝑡𝑙c_{t}^{l}. At each time step the LSTM can choose to read from, write to, or reset the cell using explicit gating mechanisms. The precise form of the update is as follows:
items.zh: 长短期记忆（LSTM）（Hochreiter & Schmidhuber, 1997）旨在解决训练RNN的困难（Bengio et al., 1994）。特别是，观察到反向传播动力学导致RNN中的梯度要么消失要么爆炸。后来发现，爆炸梯度问题可以通过将梯度裁剪到某个最大值的启发式方法缓解（Pascanu et al., 2012）。另一方面，LSTM旨在缓解梯度消失问题。除了隐藏状态向量h_t^l外，LSTM还维护一个记忆向量c_t^l。在每个时间步，LSTM可以选择使用显式的门控机制从细胞中读取、写入或重置细胞。更新的精确形式如下：

items.en: Here, the sigmoid function sigmsigm\mathrm{sigm} and tanh\tanh are applied element-wise, and Wlsuperscript𝑊𝑙W^{l} is a [4​n×2​n4𝑛2𝑛4n\times 2n] matrix. The three vectors i,f,o∈ℝn𝑖𝑓𝑜superscriptℝ𝑛i,f,o\in\mathbb{R}^{n} are thought of as binary gates that control whether each memory cell is updated, whether it is reset to zero, and whether its local state is revealed in the hidden vector, respectively. The activations of these gates are based on the sigmoid function and hence allowed to range smoothly between zero and one to keep the model differentiable. The vector g∈ℝn𝑔superscriptℝ𝑛g\in\mathbb{R}^{n} ranges between -1 and 1 and is used to additively modify the memory contents. This additive interaction is a critical feature of the LSTM’s design, because during backpropagation a sum operation merely distributes gradients. This allows gradients on the memory cells c𝑐c to flow backwards through time uninterrupted for long time periods, or at least until the flow is disrupted with the multiplicative interaction of an active forget gate. Lastly, note that an implementation of the LSTM requires one to maintain two vectors (htlsuperscriptsubscriptℎ𝑡𝑙h_{t}^{l} and ctlsuperscriptsubscript𝑐𝑡𝑙c_{t}^{l}) at every point in the network.
items.zh: 这里，sigmoid函数sigm和tanh逐元素应用，W^l是一个[4n × 2n]矩阵。三个向量i, f, o ∈ ℝ^n被视为二进制门，分别控制每个记忆细胞是否更新、是否重置为零以及其局部状态是否在隐藏向量中显示。这些门的激活基于sigmoid函数，因此允许在0和1之间平滑变化以保持模型可微分。向量g ∈ ℝ^n的范围在-1和1之间，用于加性修改记忆内容。这种加性交互是LSTM设计的一个关键特征，因为在反向传播过程中，求和操作仅分配梯度。这使得记忆细胞c上的梯度可以无中断地长时间向后流动，或者至少直到被活跃的遗忘门的乘法交互中断。最后，注意LSTM的实现需要在网络中的每个点维护两个向量（h_t^l和c_t^l）。

items.en: We use character-level language modeling as an interpretable testbed for sequence learning. In this setting, the input to the network is a sequence of characters and the network is trained to predict the next character in the sequence with a Softmax classifier at each time step. Concretely, assuming a fixed vocabulary of K𝐾K characters we encode all characters with K𝐾K-dimensional 1-of-K𝐾K vectors {xt},t=1,…,Tformulae-sequencesubscript𝑥𝑡𝑡1…𝑇\{x_{t}\},t=1,\ldots,T, and feed these to the recurrent network to obtain a sequence of D𝐷D-dimensional hidden vectors at the last layer of the network {htL},t=1,…,Tformulae-sequencesuperscriptsubscriptℎ𝑡𝐿𝑡1…𝑇\{h_{t}^{L}\},t=1,\dots,T. To obtain predictions for the next character in the sequence we project this top layer of activations to a sequence of vectors {yt}subscript𝑦𝑡\{y_{t}\}, where yt=Wy​htLsubscript𝑦𝑡subscript𝑊𝑦superscriptsubscriptℎ𝑡𝐿y_{t}=W_{y}h_{t}^{L} and Wysubscript𝑊𝑦W_{y} is a [K×D𝐾𝐷K\times D] parameter matrix. These vectors are interpreted as holding the (unnormalized) log probability of the next character in the sequence and the objective is to minimize the average cross-entropy loss over all targets.
items.zh: 我们使用字符级语言建模作为序列学习的可解释测试平台。在此设置中，网络的输入是一个字符序列，网络被训练在每个时间步使用Softmax分类器预测序列中的下一个字符。具体来说，假设一个固定的K个字符的词汇表，我们将所有字符编码为K维的1-of-K向量{x_t}, t=1,...,T，并将这些向量馈送到递归网络，以获得网络最后一层的D维隐藏向量序列{h_t^L}, t=1,...,T。为了预测序列中的下一个字符，我们将这一顶层激活投影到向量序列{y_t}，其中y_t = W_y h_t^L，W_y是一个[K × D]参数矩阵。这些向量被解释为保存下一个字符的（未归一化）对数概率，目标是最小化所有目标上的平均交叉熵损失。

items.en: Following previous work Sutskever et al. (2014) we initialize all parameters uniformly in range [−0.08,0.08]0.080.08[-0.08,0.08]. We use mini-batch stochastic gradient descent with batch size 100 and RMSProp Dauphin et al. (2015) per-parameter adaptive update with base learning rate 2×10−32superscript1032\times 10^{-3} and decay 0.950.950.95. These settings work robustly with all of our models. The network is unrolled for 100 time steps. We train each model for 50 epochs and decay the learning rate after 10 epochs by multiplying it with a factor of 0.95 after each additional epoch. We use early stopping based on validation performance and cross-validate the amount of dropout for each model individually.
items.zh: 遵循先前的工作（Sutskever et al., 2014），我们将所有参数均匀初始化为范围[-0.08, 0.08]。我们使用批量大小为100的小批量随机梯度下降和RMSProp（Dauphin et al., 2015）的逐参数自适应更新，基础学习率为2×10^{-3}，衰减为0.95。这些设置对我们的所有模型都稳健地工作。网络展开100个时间步。我们训练每个模型50个epoch，并在10个epoch后通过每个额外epoch乘以0.95来衰减学习率。我们基于验证性能使用早停，并针对每个模型单独交叉验证dropout量。

items.en: Datasets. Two datasets previously used in the context of character-level language models are the Penn Treebank dataset Marcus et al. (1993) and the Hutter Prize 100MB of Wikipedia dataset Hutter (2012) . However, both datasets contain a mix of common language and special markup. Our goal is not to compete with previous work but rather to study recurrent networks in a controlled setting and on both ends on the spectrum of degree of structure. Therefore, we chose to use Leo Tolstoy’s War and Peace (WP) novel, which consists of 3,258,246 characters of almost entirely English text with minimal markup, and at the other end of the spectrum the source code of the Linux Kernel (LK). We shuffled all header and source files randomly and concatenated them into a single file to form the 6,206,996 character long dataset. We split the data into train/val/test splits as 80/10/10 for WP and 90/5/5 for LK. Therefore, there are approximately 300,000 characters in the validation/test splits in each case. The total number of characters in the vocabulary is 87 for WP and 101 for LK.
items.zh: 数据集。先前在字符级语言模型背景下使用的两个数据集是宾州树库数据集（Marcus et al., 1993）和Hutter Prize 100MB维基百科数据集（Hutter, 2012）。然而，这两个数据集都包含常见语言和特殊标记的混合。我们的目标不是与先前的工作竞争，而是在受控设置下研究递归网络，并在结构程度谱的两端进行研究。因此，我们选择使用列夫·托尔斯泰的《战争与和平》（WP）小说，该小说包含3,258,246个字符，几乎全部是英文文本，标记最少；而在谱的另一端，我们使用Linux内核（LK）的源代码。我们将所有头文件和源文件随机打乱并连接成一个文件，形成6,206,996个字符的数据集。我们将数据按80/10/10（WP）和90/5/5（LK）划分为训练/验证/测试集。因此，每种情况下验证/测试集中大约有300,000个字符。词汇表中的总字符数WP为87，LK为101。

items.en: We first train several recurrent network models to support further analysis and to compare their performance in a controlled setting. In particular, we train models in the cross product of type (LSTM/RNN/GRU), number of layers (1/2/3), number of parameters (4 settings), and both datasets (WP/KL). For a 1-layer LSTM we used hidden size vectors of 64,128,256, and 512 cells, which with our character vocabulary sizes translates to approximately 50K, 130K, 400K, and 1.3M parameters respectively. The sizes of hidden layers of the other models were carefully chosen so that the total number of parameters in each case is as close as possible to these 4 settings.
items.zh: 我们首先训练几个递归网络模型以支持进一步分析，并在受控设置下比较它们的性能。特别是，我们在类型（LSTM/RNN/GRU）、层数（1/2/3）、参数数量（4种设置）和两个数据集（WP/LK）的笛卡尔积上训练模型。对于1层LSTM，我们使用隐藏大小向量为64、128、256和512个细胞，这对应于我们的字符词汇表大小，分别约为50K、130K、400K和1.3M个参数。其他模型的隐藏层大小被仔细选择，使得每种情况下的总参数数量尽可能接近这4种设置。

items.en: The test set results are shown in Figure 1. Our consistent finding is that depth of at least two is beneficial. However, between two and three layers our results are mixed. Additionally, the results are mixed between the LSTM and the GRU, but both significantly outperform the RNN. We also computed the fraction of times that each pair of models agree on the most likely character and use it to render a t-SNE Van der Maaten & Hinton (2008) embedding (we found this more stable and robust than the KL divergence). The plot (Figure 1, right) further supports the claim that the LSTM and the GRU make similar predictions while the RNNs form their own cluster.
items.zh: 测试集结果如图1所示。我们一致的发现是至少两层深度是有益的。然而，在两层和三层之间，我们的结果好坏参半。此外，LSTM和GRU之间的结果好坏参半，但两者都显著优于RNN。我们还计算了每对模型在最大可能字符上一致同意的次数，并使用它来渲染t-SNE（Van der Maaten & Hinton, 2008）嵌入（我们发现这比KL散度更稳定和稳健）。该图（图1，右）进一步支持了LSTM和GRU做出相似预测而RNN形成自己聚类的说法。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Left: The test set cross-entropy loss for all models and datasets (low is good). Models in each row have nearly equal number of parameters. The test set has 300,000 characters. The standard deviation, estimated with 100 bootstrap samples, is less than 4×10−34superscript1034\times 10^{-3} in all cases. Right: A t-SNE embedding based on the probabilities assigned to test set characters by each model on War and Peace. The color, size, and marker correspond to model type, model size, and number of layers.
items.capZh: 图1：左：所有模型和数据集的测试集交叉熵损失（低为好）。每行中的模型具有几乎相同数量的参数。测试集有300,000个字符。通过100个bootstrap样本估计的标准差在所有情况下小于4×10^{-3}。右：基于每个模型在《战争与和平》测试集字符上分配的概率的t-SNE嵌入。颜色、大小和标记分别对应模型类型、模型大小和层数。

items.en: Interpretable, long-range LSTM cells. An LSTMs can in principle use its memory cells to remember long-range information and keep track of various attributes of text it is currently processing. For instance, it is a simple exercise to write down toy cell weights that would allow the cell to keep track of whether it is inside a quoted string. However, to our knowledge, the existence of such cells has never been experimentally demonstrated on real-world data. In particular, it could be argued that even if the LSTM is in principle capable of using these operations, practical optimization challenges (i.e. SGD dynamics, or approximate gradients due to truncated backpropagation through time) might prevent it from discovering these solutions. In this experiment we verify that multiple interpretable cells do in fact exist in these networks (see Figure 2). For instance, one cell is clearly acting as a line length counter, starting with a high value and then slowly decaying with each character until the next newline. Other cells turn on inside quotes, the parenthesis after if statements, inside strings or comments, or with increasing strength as the indentation of a block of code increases. In particular, note that truncated backpropagation with our hyperparameters prevents the gradient signal from directly noticing dependencies longer than 100 characters, but we still observe cells that reliably keep track of quotes or comment blocks much longer than 100 characters (e.g. ∼230similar-toabsent230\sim 230 characters in the quote detection cell example in Figure 2). We hypothesize that these cells first develop on patterns shorter than 100 characters but then also appropriately generalize to longer sequences.
items.zh: 可解释的长程LSTM细胞。LSTM原则上可以利用其记忆细胞记住长程信息，并跟踪当前处理文本的各种属性。例如，设计一个玩具细胞权重，使细胞能够跟踪是否在引号字符串内，是一个简单的练习。然而，据我们所知，这种细胞的存在从未在实际数据上得到实验证明。特别是，有人可能会认为，即使LSTM原则上能够使用这些操作，实际的优化挑战（如SGD动态，或因截断时间反向传播导致的近似梯度）可能会阻止它发现这些解决方案。在本实验中，我们验证了这些网络中确实存在多个可解释的细胞（见图2）。例如，一个细胞明显充当行长度计数器，从高值开始，然后随着每个字符缓慢衰减，直到下一个换行符。其他细胞在引号内、if语句后的括号内、字符串或注释内开启，或者随着代码块缩进的增加而增强。特别值得注意的是，使用我们的超参数进行截断反向传播会阻止梯度信号直接注意到超过100个字符的依赖关系，但我们仍然观察到细胞可靠地跟踪远超过100个字符的引号或注释块（例如，图2中引号检测细胞示例中约230个字符）。我们假设这些细胞首先在短于100个字符的模式上发展，然后适当地泛化到更长的序列。

items.en: Gate activation statistics. We can gain some insight into the internal mechanisms of the LSTM by studying the gate activations in the networks as they process test set data. We were particularly interested in looking at the distributions of saturation regimes in the networks, where we define a gate to be left or right-saturated if its activation is less than 0.1 or more than 0.9, respectively, or unsaturated otherwise. We then compute the fraction of times that each LSTM gate spends left or right saturated, and plot the results in Figure 3. For instance, the number of often right-saturated forget gates is particularly interesting, since this corresponds to cells that remember their values for very long time periods. Note that there are multiple cells that are almost always right-saturated (showing up on bottom, right of the forget gate scatter plot), and hence function as nearly perfect integrators. Conversely, there are no cells that function in purely feed-forward fashion, since their forget gates would show up as consistently left-saturated (in top, left of the forget gate scatter plot). The output gate statistics also reveal that there are no cells that get consistently revealed or blocked to the hidden state. Lastly, a surprising finding is that unlike the other two layers that contain gates with nearly binary regime of operation (frequently either left or right saturated), the activations in the first layer are much more diffuse (near the origin in our scatter plots). We struggle to explain this finding but note that it is present across all of our models. A similar effect is present in our GRU model, where the first layer reset gates r𝑟r are nearly never right-saturated and the update gates z𝑧z are rarely ever left-saturated. This points towards a purely feed-forward mode of operation on this layer, where the previous hidden state is barely used.
items.zh: 门激活统计。通过研究网络在处理测试集数据时的门激活，我们可以深入了解LSTM的内部机制。我们特别关注网络中饱和状态的分布，其中如果门的激活值小于0.1或大于0.9，我们分别定义其为左饱和或右饱和，否则为非饱和。然后我们计算每个LSTM门处于左饱和或右饱和的时间比例，并将结果绘制在图3中。例如，经常右饱和的遗忘门数量特别有趣，因为这对应于长时间记住其值的细胞。注意，有多个细胞几乎总是右饱和（出现在遗忘门散点图的右下角），因此功能上接近完美的积分器。相反，没有细胞以纯前馈方式工作，因为它们的遗忘门会显示为持续左饱和（出现在遗忘门散点图的左上角）。输出门统计也显示，没有细胞被持续地揭示或阻塞到隐藏状态。最后，一个令人惊讶的发现是，与其他两层包含几乎二值操作模式的门（经常左饱和或右饱和）不同，第一层的激活要分散得多（在我们的散点图中靠近原点）。我们难以解释这一发现，但注意到它存在于我们所有的模型中。在我们的GRU模型中也有类似的效果，其中第一层的重置门r几乎从不右饱和，更新门z很少左饱和。这表明该层以纯前馈模式运行，几乎不使用先前的隐藏状态。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Several examples of cells with interpretable activations discovered in our best Linux Kernel and War and Peace LSTMs. Text color corresponds to t​a​n​h​(c)𝑡𝑎𝑛ℎ𝑐tanh(c), where -1 is red and +1 is blue.
items.capZh: 图2：在我们最好的Linux内核和战争与和平LSTM中发现的几个具有可解释激活的细胞示例。文本颜色对应tanh(c)，其中-1为红色，+1为蓝色。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Left three: Saturation plots for an LSTM. Each circle is a gate in the LSTM and its position is determined by the fraction of time it is left or right-saturated. These fractions must add to at most one (indicated by the diagonal line). Right two: Saturation plot for a 3-layer GRU model.
items.capZh: 图3：左三图：LSTM的饱和图。每个圆圈是LSTM中的一个门，其位置由左饱和或右饱和的时间比例决定。这些比例之和最多为1（由对角线表示）。右两图：3层GRU模型的饱和图。

items.en: Good performance of LSTMs is frequently attributed to their ability to store long-range information. In this section we test this hypothesis by comparing an LSTM with baseline models that can only utilize information from a fixed number of previous steps. In particular, we consider two baselines:
items.zh: LSTM的良好性能通常归因于其存储长程信息的能力。在本节中，我们通过将LSTM与只能利用固定数量先前步骤信息的基线模型进行比较来检验这一假设。具体来说，我们考虑两个基线：

items.en: 1. n𝑛n-NN: A fully-connected neural network with one hidden layer and tanhtanh\mathrm{tanh} nonlinearities. The input to the network is a sparse binary vector of dimension n​K𝑛𝐾nK that concatenates the one-of-K𝐾K encodings of n𝑛n consecutive characters. We optimize the model as described in Section 3.3 and cross-validate the size of the hidden layer.
items.zh: 1. n-NN：一个具有一个隐藏层和tanh非线性的全连接神经网络。网络的输入是一个维度为nK的稀疏二进制向量，它连接了n个连续字符的独热编码。我们按照第3.3节所述优化模型，并交叉验证隐藏层的大小。

items.en: 2. n𝑛n-gram: An unpruned (n+1)𝑛1(n+1)-gram language model using modified Kneser-Ney smoothing Chen & Goodman (1999). This is a standard smoothing method for language models Huang et al. (2001). All models were trained using the popular KenLM software package Heafield et al. (2013).
items.zh: 2. n-gram：一个未剪枝的(n+1)-gram语言模型，使用修改的Kneser-Ney平滑（Chen & Goodman, 1999）。这是语言模型的标准平滑方法（Huang et al., 2001）。所有模型均使用流行的KenLM软件包（Heafield et al., 2013）进行训练。

items.en: Performance comparisons. The performance of both n𝑛n-gram models is shown in Table 2. The n𝑛n-gram and n𝑛n-NN models perform nearly identically for small values of n𝑛n, but for larger values the n𝑛n-NN models start to overfit and the n𝑛n-gram model performs better. Moreover, we see that on both datasets our best recurrent network outperforms the 20-gram model (1.077 vs. 1.195 on WP and 0.84 vs.0.889). It is difficult to make a direct model size comparison, but the 20-gram model file has 3GB, while our largest checkpoints are 11MB. However, the assumptions encoded in the Kneser-Ney smoothing model are intended for word-level modeling of natural language and may not be optimal for character-level data. Despite this concern, these results already provide weak evidence that the recurrent networks are effectively utilizing information beyond 20 characters.
items.zh: 性能比较。两种n-gram模型的性能如表2所示。对于较小的n值，n-gram和n-NN模型的表现几乎相同，但对于较大的n值，n-NN模型开始过拟合，而n-gram模型表现更好。此外，我们看到在两个数据集上，我们最好的循环网络都优于20-gram模型（WP上1.077 vs. 1.195，LK上0.84 vs. 0.889）。直接比较模型大小很困难，但20-gram模型文件大小为3GB，而我们最大的检查点为11MB。然而，Kneser-Ney平滑模型中编码的假设是针对自然语言的词级建模，可能不适用于字符级数据。尽管存在这一担忧，这些结果已经提供了弱证据，表明循环网络有效地利用了超过20个字符的信息。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Left: Overlap between test-set errors between our best 3-layer LSTM and the n𝑛n-gram models (low area is good). Middle/Right: Mean probabilities assigned to a correct character (higher is better), broken down by the character, and then sorted by the difference between two models. “<s>” is the space character. LSTM (red) outperforms the 20-gram model (blue) on special characters that require long-range reasoning. Middle: LK dataset, Right: WP dataset.
items.capZh: 图4：左图：我们最好的3层LSTM与n-gram模型之间测试集错误的重叠（低面积好）。中/右图：正确字符的平均概率（越高越好），按字符分解，然后按两个模型之间的差异排序。“<s>”是空格字符。LSTM（红色）在需要长程推理的特殊字符上优于20-gram模型（蓝色）。中图：LK数据集，右图：WP数据集。

items.en: Error Analysis. It is instructive to delve deeper into the errors made by both recurrent networks and n𝑛n-gram models. In particular, we define a character to be an error if the probability assigned to it by a model on the previous time step is below 0.5. Figure 4 (left) shows the overlap between the test-set errors for the 3-layer LSTM, and the best n𝑛n-NN and n𝑛n-gram models. We see that the majority of errors are shared by all three models, but each model also has its own unique errors.
items.zh: 错误分析。深入研究循环网络和n-gram模型所犯的错误是有启发性的。具体来说，我们定义一个字符为错误，如果模型在前一个时间步分配给它的概率低于0.5。图4（左）显示了3层LSTM与最佳n-NN和n-gram模型之间测试集错误的重叠。我们看到大多数错误是所有三个模型共有的，但每个模型也有自己独特的错误。

items.en: To gain deeper insight into the errors that are unique to the LSTM or the 20-gram model, we compute the mean probability assigned to each character in the vocabulary across the test set. In Figure 4 (middle,right) we display the 10 characters where each model has the largest advantage over the other. On the Linux Kernel dataset, the LSTM displays a large advantage on special characters that are used to structure C programs, including whitespace and brackets. The War and Peace dataset features an interesting long-term dependency with the carriage return, which occurs approximately every 70 characters. Figure 4 (right) shows that the LSTM has a distinct advantage on this character. To accurately predict the presence of the carriage return the model likely needs to keep track of its distance since the last carriage return. The cell example we’ve highlighted in Figure 2 (top, left) seems particularly well-tuned for this specific task. Similarly, to predict a closing bracket or quotation mark, the model must be aware of the corresponding open bracket, which may have appeared many time steps ago. The fact that the LSTM performs significantly better than the 20-gram model on these characters provides strong evidence that the model is capable of effectively keeping track of long-range interactions.
items.zh: 为了更深入地了解LSTM或20-gram模型独有的错误，我们计算了测试集中每个词汇字符的平均概率。在图4（中、右）中，我们展示了每个模型相对于另一个模型具有最大优势的10个字符。在Linux内核数据集上，LSTM在用于结构化C程序的特殊字符（包括空格和括号）上显示出巨大优势。战争与和平数据集则有一个有趣的长期依赖关系，即回车符，大约每70个字符出现一次。图4（右）显示LSTM在这个字符上有明显优势。为了准确预测回车符的存在，模型可能需要跟踪自上次回车符以来的距离。我们在图2（左上）中强调的细胞示例似乎特别适合这个特定任务。类似地，为了预测右括号或引号，模型必须知道相应的左括号，它可能出现在许多时间步之前。LSTM在这些字符上的表现显著优于20-gram模型，这提供了强有力的证据，表明该模型能够有效地跟踪长程交互。

items.en: Case study: closing brace. Of these structural characters, the one that requires the longest-term reasoning is the closing brace (“}”) on the Linux Kernel dataset. Braces are used to denote blocks of code, and may be nested; as such, the distance between an opening brace and its corresponding closing brace can range from tens to hundreds of characters. This feature makes the closing brace an ideal test case for studying the ability of the LSTM to reason over various time scales. We group closing brace characters on the test set by the distance to their corresponding open brace and compute the mean probability assigned by the LSTM and the 20-gram model to closing braces within each group. The results are shown in Figure 5 (left). First, note that the LSTM only slightly outperforms the 20-gram model in the first bin, where the distance between braces is only up to 20 characters. After this point the performance of the 20-gram model stays relatively constant, reflecting a baseline probability of predicting the closing brace without seeing its matching opening brace. Compared to this baseline, we see that the LSTM gains significant boosts up to 60 characters, and then its performance delta slowly decays over time as it becomes difficult to keep track of the dependence.
items.zh: 案例研究：右花括号。在这些结构字符中，需要最长程推理的是Linux内核数据集上的右花括号“}”。花括号用于表示代码块，并且可以嵌套；因此，左花括号与其对应的右花括号之间的距离可以从几十到几百个字符不等。这一特性使得右花括号成为研究LSTM在不同时间尺度上推理能力的理想测试案例。我们将测试集上的右花括号字符按其与对应左花括号的距离分组，并计算LSTM和20-gram模型分配给每组中右花括号的平均概率。结果如图5（左）所示。首先，注意在第一个区间中，LSTM仅略优于20-gram模型，其中花括号之间的距离最多为20个字符。在此之后，20-gram模型的性能保持相对恒定，反映了在没有看到匹配左花括号的情况下预测右花括号的基线概率。与这个基线相比，我们看到LSTM在长达60个字符的距离内获得了显著的提升，然后其性能差异随时间缓慢衰减，因为跟踪依赖关系变得困难。

items.en: Training dynamics. It is also instructive to examine the training dynamics of the LSTM by comparing it with trained n𝑛n-NN models during training using the (symmetric) KL divergence between the predictive distributions on the test set. We plot the divergence and the difference in the mean loss in Figure 5 (right). Notably, we see that in the first few iterations the LSTM behaves like the 1-NN model but then diverges from it soon after. The LSTM then behaves most like the 2-NN, 3-NN, and 4-NN models in turn. This experiment suggests that the LSTM “grows” its competence over increasingly longer dependencies during training. This insight might be related to why Sutskever et al. Sutskever et al. (2014) observe improvements when they reverse the source sentences in their encoder-decoder architecture for machine translation. The inversion introduces short-term dependencies that the LSTM can model first, and then longer dependencies are learned over time.
items.zh: 训练动态。通过比较LSTM与训练中的n-NN模型在测试集上的预测分布（使用对称KL散度），检查LSTM的训练动态也是有启发性的。我们在图5（右）中绘制了散度和平均损失差异。值得注意的是，我们看到在前几次迭代中，LSTM的行为类似于1-NN模型，但很快与之分道扬镳。然后LSTM依次表现得最像2-NN、3-NN和4-NN模型。这个实验表明，LSTM在训练过程中逐渐增长其对越来越长依赖关系的能力。这一见解可能与Sutskever等人（Sutskever et al., 2014）在机器翻译的编码器-解码器架构中反转源句子时观察到的改进有关。反转引入了LSTM可以首先建模的短期依赖关系，然后随着时间的推移学习更长的依赖关系。

items.capEn: Figure 5: Left: Mean probabilities that the LSTM and 20-gram model assign to the “}” character, bucketed by the distance to the matching “{”. Right: Comparison of the similarity between 3-layer LSTM and the n𝑛n-NN baselines over the first 3 epochs of training, as measured by the symmetric KL-divergence (middle) and the test set loss (right). Low KL indicates similar predictions, and positive ΔΔ\Deltaloss indicates that the LSTM outperforms the baseline.
items.capZh: 图5：左图：LSTM和20-gram模型分配给“}”字符的平均概率，按与匹配“{”的距离分桶。右图：3层LSTM与n-NN基线在前3个训练周期内的相似性比较，通过对称KL散度（中）和测试集损失（右）衡量。低KL表示预测相似，正Δloss表示LSTM优于基线。

full.sec: 4.4 Error Analysis: Breaking Down the Failure Cases
full.secZh: 4.4 错误分析：分解失败案例

items.en: In this section we break down LSTM’s errors into categories to study the remaining limitations, the relative severity of each error type, and to suggest areas for further study. We focus on the War and Peace dataset where it is easier to categorize the errors. Our approach is to “peel the onion” by iteratively removing the errors with a series of constructed oracles. As in the last section, we consider a character to be an error if the probability it was assigned by the model in the previous time step is below 0.5. Note that the order in which the oracles are applied influences the results. We tried to apply the oracles in order of increasing difficulty of removing each error category and believe that the final results are instructive despite this downside. The oracles we use are, in order:
items.zh: 在本节中，我们将LSTM的错误分解为类别，以研究剩余的局限性、每种错误类型的相对严重性，并建议进一步研究的领域。我们专注于战争与和平数据集，因为更容易对错误进行分类。我们的方法是通过一系列构建的预言机迭代地去除错误，类似于“剥洋葱”。与上一节一样，我们考虑一个字符为错误，如果模型在前一个时间步分配给它的概率低于0.5。注意，预言机应用的顺序会影响结果。我们尝试按照去除每个错误类别难度递增的顺序应用预言机，并相信尽管存在这一缺点，最终结果仍具有启发性。我们使用的预言机按顺序为：

items.en: n𝑛n-gram oracle. First, we construct optimistic n𝑛n-gram oracles that eliminate errors that might be fixed with better modeling of short dependencies. In particular, we evaluate the n𝑛n-gram model (n=1,…,9𝑛1…9n=1,\ldots,9) and remove a character error if it is correctly classified (probability assigned to that character greater than 0.5) by any of these models. This gives us an approximate idea of the amount of signal present only in the last 9 characters, and how many errors we could optimistically hope to eliminate without needing to reason over long time horizons.
items.zh: n-gram预言机。首先，我们构建乐观的n-gram预言机，消除可能通过更好地建模短依赖关系而修复的错误。具体来说，我们评估n-gram模型（n=1,…,9），如果某个字符错误被这些模型中的任何一个正确分类（分配给该字符的概率大于0.5），则将其移除。这让我们大致了解仅存在于最后9个字符中的信号量，以及在不需长程推理的情况下乐观地可以消除多少错误。

items.en: Dynamic n𝑛n-long memory oracle. To motivate the next oracle, consider the string “Jon yelled at Mary but Mary couldn’t hear him.” One interesting and consistent failure mode that we noticed in the predictions is that if the LSTM fails to predict the characters of the first occurrence of “Mary” then it will almost always also fail to predict the same characters of the second occurrence, with a nearly identical pattern of errors. However, in principle the presence of the first mention should make the second much more likely. The LSTM could conceivably store a summary of previously seen characters in the data and fall back on this memory when it is uncertain. However, this does not appear to take place in practice. This limitation is related to the improvements seen in “dynamic evaluation” Mikolov (2012); Jelinek et al. (1991) of recurrent language models, where an RNN is allowed to train on the test set characters during evaluation as long as it sees them only once. In this mode of operation when the RNN trains on the first occurrence of “Mary”, the log probabilities on the second occurrence are significantly better. We hypothesize that this dynamic aspect is a common feature of sequence data, where certain subsequences that might not frequently occur in the training data should still be more likely if they were present in the immediate history. However, this general algorithm does not seem to be learned by the LSTM. Our dynamic memory oracle quantifies the severity of this limitation by removing errors in all words (starting with the second character) that can found as a substring in the last n𝑛n characters (we use n∈{100,500,1000,5000})n\in\{100,500,1000,5000\}).
items.zh: 动态n长记忆预言机。为了激发下一个预言机，考虑字符串“Jon yelled at Mary but Mary couldn't hear him.”。我们在预测中注意到一个有趣且一致的失败模式：如果LSTM未能预测第一次出现的“Mary”的字符，那么它几乎总是也会未能预测第二次出现的相同字符，错误模式几乎相同。然而，原则上第一次提及的存在应该使第二次更有可能。LSTM可以设想在数据中存储先前看到字符的摘要，并在不确定时依赖这个记忆。然而，这在实际中似乎并未发生。这一局限性与循环语言模型“动态评估”（Mikolov, 2012; Jelinek et al., 1991）中看到的改进有关，其中允许RNN在评估期间在测试集字符上训练，只要它只看到它们一次。在这种操作模式下，当RNN在第一次出现“Mary”上训练时，第二次出现的对数概率显著更好。我们假设这种动态方面是序列数据的一个常见特征，其中某些在训练数据中可能不频繁出现的子序列，如果它们出现在直接历史中，应该更有可能。然而，LSTM似乎没有学会这种通用算法。我们的动态记忆预言机通过消除所有在最后n个字符中可以作为子串找到的单词（从第二个字符开始）中的错误来量化这一局限性的严重性（我们使用n∈{100,500,1000,5000}）。

items.capEn: Figure 6: Left: LSTM errors removed one by one with oracles, starting from top of the pie chart and going counter-clockwise. The area of each slice corresponds to fraction of errors contributed. “n𝑛n-memory” refers to dynamic memory oracle with context of n𝑛n previous characters. “Word t𝑡t-train” refers to the rare words oracle with word count threshold of t𝑡t. Right: Concrete examples of text from the test set for each error type. Blue color highlights the relevant characters with the associated error. For the memory category we also highlight the repeated substrings with red bounding rectangles.
items.capZh: 图6：左图：LSTM错误通过预言机逐一去除，从饼图顶部开始逆时针方向。每个切片面积对应错误贡献的比例。“n-memory”指上下文为n个先前字符的动态记忆预言机。“Word t-train”指词频阈值为t的罕见词预言机。右图：每种错误类型的测试集文本具体示例。蓝色高亮显示相关字符及其关联错误。对于记忆类别，我们还用红色矩形框高亮重复的子串。

items.en: Rare words oracle. Next, we construct an oracle that eliminates errors for rare words that occur only up to n𝑛n times in the training data (n=0,…,5𝑛0…5n=0,\ldots,5). This estimates the severity of errors that could optimistically be eliminated by increasing the size of the training data, or with pretraining.
items.zh: 罕见词预言机。接下来，我们构建一个预言机，消除在训练数据中仅出现最多n次的罕见词上的错误（n=0,…,5）。这估计了通过增加训练数据大小或预训练可以乐观消除的错误的严重性。

items.en: Word model oracle. We noticed that a large portion of the errors occur on the first character of each word. Intuitively, the task of selecting the next word in the sequence is harder than completing the last few characters of a known word. Motivated by this observation we constructed an oracle that eliminated all errors after a space, quote or a newline. Interestingly, a high portion of errors can be found after a newline, since the models have to learn that newline has semantics similar to a space.
items.zh: 词模型预言机。我们注意到很大一部分错误出现在每个单词的第一个字符上。直观上，选择序列中下一个单词的任务比完成已知单词的最后几个字符更难。受此观察启发，我们构建了一个预言机，消除了空格、引号或换行符之后的所有错误。有趣的是，换行符之后可以发现很高比例的错误，因为模型必须学习换行符具有类似于空格的语义。

items.en: Punctuation oracle. The remaining errors become difficult to blame on one particular, interpretable aspect of the modeling. At this point we construct an oracle that removes errors on all punctuation.
items.zh: 标点符号预言机。剩余的误差很难归咎于建模中某个特定的、可解释的方面。此时，我们构建了一个预言机，用于消除所有标点符号上的误差。

items.en: Boost oracles. The remaining errors that do not show salient structures or patterns are removed by an oracle that boosts the probability of the correct letter by a fixed amount. These oracles allow us to understand the distribution of the difficulty of the remaining errors.
items.zh: 提升预言机。那些没有表现出显著结构或模式的剩余误差，通过一个以固定量提升正确字母概率的预言机来消除。这些预言机使我们能够理解剩余误差的难度分布。

items.en: We now subject two LSTM models to the error analysis: First, our best LSTM model and second, the best LSTM model in the smallest model category (50K parameters). The small and large models allow us to understand how the error break down changes as we scale up the model. The error breakdown after applying each oracle for both models can be found in Figure 6.
items.zh: 现在，我们对两个LSTM模型进行误差分析：首先是我们最好的LSTM模型，其次是最小模型类别（50K参数）中最好的LSTM模型。小模型和大模型使我们能够理解随着模型规模扩大，误差分解如何变化。应用每个预言机后两个模型的误差分解见图6。

items.en: The error breakdown. In total, our best LSTM model made a total of 140K errors out of 330K test set characters (42%). Of these, the n𝑛n-gram oracle eliminates 18%, suggesting that the model is not taking full advantage of the last 9 characters. The dynamic memory oracle eliminates 6% of the errors. In principle, a dynamic evaluation scheme could be used to mitigate this error, but we believe that a more principled approach could involve an approach similar to Memory Networks Weston et al. (2014), where the model is allowed to attend to a recent history of the sequence while making its next prediction. Finally, the rare words oracle accounts for 9% of the errors. This error type might be mitigated with unsupervised pretraining Dai & Le (2015), or by increasing the size of the training set. The majority of the remaining errors (37%) follow a space, a quote, or a newline, indicating the model’s difficulty with word-level predictions. This suggests that longer time horizons in backpropagation through time, or possibly hierarchical context models, could provide improvements. See Figure 6 (right) for examples of each error type. We believe that this type of error breakdown is a valuable tool for isolating and understanding the source of improvements provided by new proposed models.
items.zh: 误差分解。总体而言，我们最好的LSTM模型在330K测试集字符中总共产生了140K个误差（42%）。其中，n-gram预言机消除了18%，表明模型没有充分利用最后9个字符。动态记忆预言机消除了6%的误差。原则上，可以使用动态评估方案来缓解这一误差，但我们认为更原则性的方法可能涉及类似于Memory Networks（Weston等人，2014）的方法，即允许模型在进行下一个预测时关注序列的近期历史。最后，罕见词预言机占误差的9%。这种误差类型可能通过无监督预训练（Dai & Le, 2015）或增加训练集大小来缓解。剩余的大部分误差（37%）出现在空格、引号或换行之后，表明模型在词级预测上存在困难。这表明，通过时间反向传播的更长时间跨度，或可能的层次上下文模型，可以提供改进。每种误差类型的示例见图6（右）。我们相信，这种误差分解是隔离和理解新提出模型改进来源的宝贵工具。

items.en: Errors eliminated by scaling up. In contrast, the smaller LSTM model makes a total of 184K errors (or 56% of the test set), or approximately 44K more than the large model. Surprisingly, 36K of these errors (81%) are n𝑛n-gram errors, 5K come from the boost category, and the remaining 3K are distributed across the other categories relatively evenly. That is, scaling the model up by a factor 26 in the number of parameters has almost entirely provided gains in the local, n𝑛n-gram error rate and has left the other error categories untouched in comparison. This analysis provides some evidence that it might be necessary to develop new architectural improvements instead of simply scaling up the basic model.
items.zh: 通过扩大规模消除的误差。相比之下，较小的LSTM模型总共产生了184K个误差（占测试集的56%），比大模型多约44K。令人惊讶的是，其中36K个误差（81%）是n-gram误差，5K来自提升类别，其余3K相对均匀地分布在其他类别中。也就是说，将模型参数数量扩大26倍几乎完全带来了局部n-gram误差率的改善，而其他误差类别相比之下几乎没有变化。这一分析提供了一些证据，表明可能需要开发新的架构改进，而不是简单地扩大基本模型的规模。

items.en: We have used character-level language models as an interpretable test bed for analyzing the predictions, representations training dynamics, and error types present in Recurrent Neural Networks. In particular, our qualitative visualization experiments, cell activation statistics and comparisons to finite horizon n𝑛n-gram models demonstrate that these networks learn powerful, and often interpretable long-range interactions on real-world data. Our error analysis broke down cross entropy loss into several interpretable categories, and allowed us to illuminate the sources of remaining limitations and to suggest further areas for study. In particular, we found that scaling up the model almost entirely eliminates errors in the n𝑛n-gram category, which provides some evidence that further architectural innovations may be needed to address the remaining errors.
items.zh: 我们使用字符级语言模型作为可解释的测试平台，用于分析循环神经网络中的预测、表示训练动态和误差类型。特别是，我们的定性可视化实验、细胞激活统计以及与有限视野n-gram模型的比较表明，这些网络在真实世界数据上学习了强大的、通常是可解释的长程交互。我们的误差分析将交叉熵损失分解为几个可解释的类别，使我们能够阐明剩余局限性的来源，并提出进一步的研究方向。特别是，我们发现扩大模型规模几乎完全消除了n-gram类别的误差，这提供了一些证据，表明可能需要进一步的架构创新来解决剩余的误差。
